description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy designed to resemble a bear, featuring a textured, reddish-brown fabric exterior. The bear has a rounded head with two small, upright ears and a white snout area, accented by a black nose and stitched black eyes. Its body is plump and soft, with outstretched arms and short, stubby legs, both of which have cream-colored fabric on the ends to represent paws. A large, dark brown oval patch is stitched onto its belly, and a smaller patch is visible on its back, suggesting a hand-sewn or repaired look. The stitching is visible around the edges, giving it a handcrafted, cozy appearance. The overall look is friendly and inviting, making it suitable for children or as a comforting object in urban parks or playgrounds.
description: A plush, reddish-brown bear stuffed toy with a white snout, dark belly patch, and visible stitching, exuding a soft and friendly appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bear's face, white snout, black nose, stitched eyes, outstretched arms, and large dark belly patch.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the bear's profile, rounded snout, and the cream-colored paw on the left foot.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the head, body, and a small dark patch on the lower back, with no facial features visible.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the bear's profile, rounded snout, and the cream-colored paw on the right foot.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral and gentle, with round black eyes and a small, simple black nose and mouth. The lack of eyebrows or pronounced mouth shape gives it a calm and friendly demeanor.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting upright with arms slightly outstretched and legs spread apart, head facing forward.
